title: Trial Period - Loss of Customers
excerpt: Every time when I register for trial period with your product I have the same issue. I register fine, check out the UI, OK. I get busy and for second time already I go back after few days to finally take a look at it (wh…

posts.author: blurbo (Tomas Lichyu)
posts.cookedHtml: Every time when I register for trial period with your product I have the same issue. I register fine, check out the UI, OK. I get busy and for second time already I go back after few days to finally take a look at it (when I finally have time) and guess what. Trial is over. Well screw that. I don’t have time to email you and ask you this and that. I just go back to work and forget about you. To capture more future customers the trial should count days only when the customer logs in and actually uses your platform. Not counting days. Anyway let me know when this get implemented. Bye

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tomas,

I am sorry to hear of your frustration here and understand where you’re coming from. This is good feedback that I will take with the dedicated team internally

Would you be happy to direct message me your email address and I’d be happy to extend your trial on my end?

posts.author: blurbo (Tomas Lichyu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

This will be useless as I don’t have time to take a look at it and when I will have a time the trial will be not active so….really the mentioned needs to be in place so I can move further.

Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
I hear you

You’re welcome to direct message me when you have the time and I’d be more than happy to extend the trial at the convenient time for you!
